title: HostCapabilityPlacement
description: A SourceOS immutable-node placement declaration for one host capability, service workload, extension, or state root.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. 2.2.0.

placementClass.description: Canonical placement class inherited from the immutable-node host capability model.

authority.description: Repo or plane class that owns the implementation boundary for this capability.

mandatoryForBaseNode.description: Whether the capability is required for a base SourceOS immutable node without Socios enrollment.

requiresEnrollment.description: Whether activation requires opt-in enrollment, Proof-of-Life, or signed intent.

lifecycleCoupling.description: Primary lifecycle to which this capability is coupled.

pathHints.description: Expected implementation paths such as /usr/libexec/sourceos, /usr/share/containers/systemd, /var/lib/sourceos, or /var/lib/socios.

evidenceRefs.description: Optional references to evidence records emitted by the capability.

policyRef.description: Optional policy identifier or URN governing activation or mutation.
